abstract.t:
The Diameter protocol allows a Diameter redirect agent to return to the message sender one or more individual hosts as destinations of the redirected message. However, in some circumstances an operator may wish to redirect messages to an alternate domain without specifying individual hosts. This document specifies a mechanism by which this can be achieved. New applications may incorporate this capability by reference to the present document.
This memo updates Sections 6.13 and 6.14 of RFC6733 with respect to the usage of the Redirect-Host-Usage and Redirect-Max-Cache-Time AVPs.
